description: Skill for working with Firebase Hosting (Classic). Use this when you want to deploy static web apps, Single Page Apps (SPAs), or simple microservices. Do NOT use for Firebase App Hosting.
representativeQueries: How do I deploy my React app to Firebase Hosting?
Configure Firebase Hosting with redirects and rewrites
Set up preview channels for Firebase Hosting
Deploy my static website to Firebase Hosting
How to manage Firebase Hosting releases?
